reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
blocking_reasons: Gate D postures are selected, but B04 implementation remains separately gated and requires an explicit launch surface.
Externality widening, external comparative claims, and commercial activation remain deferred to later gates or later explicit authorization.

nonblocking_conflicts.resolution_rule: Use the clean-clone authoritative receipt as Gate D decision-law authority and do not overread the tracked carrier across heads.
